title: Maxicrop 86600257 Moss Killer & Lawn Tonic, 500ml - Fast Acting 2-in-1 Moss Killer and Lawn Re-Growth Tonic - with Natural Seaweed Extract - Improves Lawn Health and Strong Rooting - Garden Care
features: 2 IN 1: Convenient 2 in 1 solution for rapid moss removal and lawn re-growth
KILLS MOSS: Fast acting moss killer that blackens moss within a matter of hours
WITH SEAWEED: It's natural seaweed base with added Ferrous Sulphate & Nitrogen promotes rapid regrowth and greening
LAWN CARE: Helps to improve lawn health and strong rooting
EASY TO USE: Concentrate formula ideal for treating large areas of your lawn
description: From the manufacturer FAST AND EFFECTIVE MOSS REMOVAL Maxicrop’s 2-in-1 formula blackens moss within hours while promoting rapid grass regrowth, ensuring a lush, moss-free lawn. REVITALIZES AND STRENGTHENS GRASS Enriched with nitrogen and seaweed extract, Maxicrop stimulates healthy, green growth, fills in bare patches, and creates a nutrient-rich environment where moss struggles to return. LONG-LASTING LAWN HEALTH By enhancing soil health and resilience, Maxicrop supports deep rooting and vibrant, enduring grass, ideal for maintaining a beautiful lawn season after season.
